meta.question: Which duraton analysis senarios lack a corresponding formalized timming requirement?
meta.finalAnswer:
All 11 duration analysis scenarios in the model lack corresponding formalized timing requirements. The scenarios are:

1. APS Calibration Duration Analysis
2. APS Gravity Calibration Duration Analysis
3. APS M3 Alignment Duration Analysis
4. APS Maintenance Alignment Duration Analysis
5. APS Off-Axis Measurement Duration Analysis
6. APS Post Segment Exchange Duration Analysis
7. APS Pupil Registration Duration Analysis
8. APS Reference Point Tracking Duration Analysis
9. APS Self Test Duration Analysis
10. APS Warping Harness Influence Function Analysis Duration Analysis
11. APS Wavefront Calibration Duration Analysis

None of these simulation configuration elements have any dependency relationships linking them to TMT requirements, indicating a complete gap between the duration analysis work and formalized timing requirements in the model.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("duration")) || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("timing"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Duration%20Analysis"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Duration%20Analysis"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?scenario ?scenarioName ?req ?reqName WHERE {
  ?scenario rdf:type vocab:simulation%20configuration .
  ?scenario vocab:NamedElement_name ?scenarioName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?scenarioName)), LCASE("Duration%20Analysis")))
  
  OPTIONAL {
    ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
    ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
    FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("timing")) || 
           CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("duration")))
    ?scenario vocab:Element__relationshipOfRelatedElement ?rel .
    ?rel vocab:Dependency_supplier ?req .
  }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?scenario ?scenarioName ?req ?reqName ?relType WHERE {
  ?scenario rdf:type vocab:simulation%20configuration .
  ?scenario vocab:NamedElement_name ?scenarioName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?scenarioName)), LCASE("Duration%20Analysis")))
  
  OPTIONAL {
    ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
    ?rel vocab:Dependency_client ?scenario .
    ?rel vocab:Dependency_supplier ?req .
    ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
    ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?scenario ?scenarioName (COUNT(?req) as ?reqCount) WHERE {
  ?scenario rdf:type vocab:simulation%20configuration .
  ?scenario vocab:NamedElement_name ?scenarioName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?scenarioName)), LCASE("Duration%20Analysis")))
  
  OPTIONAL {
    ?rel vocab:Dependency_client ?scenario .
    ?rel vocab:Dependency_supplier ?req .
    ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?scenario ?scenarioName
ORDER BY ?scenarioName
LIMIT 50

request.reason: The query successfully identified all 11 duration analysis scenarios and confirmed that none of them have any associated TMT requirements (all have reqCount=0). This directly answers the user's question about which duration analysis scenarios lack corresponding formalized timing requirements.
